cases.setup: An enrolled Node disconnects and reconnects without reboot or agent replacement.
assertions: old epoch evidence cannot satisfy new work

cases.setup: The same physical Node reboots and its runtime authority is re-established.
Importer uses build-node-01, an IP address or cloud instance ID as canonical Node ID.
assertions: retain value only as scoped alias/evidence

cases.setup: A Node responds to heartbeat but enrollment is requested, rejected, expired or revoked.
Heartbeat expires while durable Node lifecycle remains active and Activities need reconciliation.
assertions: Node lifecycle not fabricated as failed/revoked

cases.setup: Dispatch decision references a snapshot whose valid_until precedes evaluated_at.
Scheduler treats total RAM/GPU/CPU as currently allocatable and ignores reserved, consumed, quarantined or pressure dimensions.
The same Node records normal, elevated and critical pressure in successive immutable snapshots.
assertions: new dispatch uses current non-expired snapshot

cases.setup: Importer writes pending_enrollment into node.lifecycle rather than the enrollment lifecycle.
assertions: Node cannot become active before approval

cases.setup: A quarantined Node remains reachable for investigation and cleanup.
Provider manifest claims GPU/device/runtime support and the system marks it verified without a frozen probe Protocol/Activity.
A capability was verified for the implementation but is currently unavailable because a dependency/device/network route is absent.
An optional dependency fails while core operations remain available.
assertions: Provider is not falsely reported fully ready

cases.setup: Eligibility references availability after its valid_until or after subject generation changed.
A Facility contract remains stable while one Provider implementation is replaced by another compatible revision.
assertions: Facility Revision reused or explicitly superseded

cases.setup: A package/executable/plugin name is used as the canonical Facility contract.
assertions: create neutral Facility and separate Provider Revision

cases.setup: Dispatch requests an operation key not defined by the exact Facility Revision.
Provider lifecycle is running while startup probe/dependencies are not ready.
Provider can accept a reduced operation subset while an optional subsystem is degraded.
assertions: readiness may be ready for bounded operations

cases.setup: A stopped/failed Provider restarts using the previous generation.
A late Receipt from generation 4 arrives after Provider Instance is on generation 5.
A Provider is remotely hosted and controlled through an approved endpoint rather than a Node-local process.
A Provider record includes both node_ref/node_generation and remote_service_ref.
A remote Provider invents Node capability/resource snapshots to satisfy local dispatch fields.
assertions: evaluate remote authority and Provider evidence instead

cases.setup: A running Provider reports health=unhealthy before failure reconciliation is complete.
assertions: failed transition requires exact-generation correlated evidence

cases.setup: A reachable and otherwise capable Provider Instance is quarantined.
Scheduler authorizes work because Node/Provider or remote endpoint is reachable but omits current capability, resource/remote authority, authorization or policy evidence.
Eligibility passes under exact current local or remote evidence and expires before dispatch if unused.
assertions: new evaluation required after expiry or generation/locality change

cases.setup: Ordinary new work is dispatched to a draining, quarantined, suspended, revoked or retired Node.
assertions: decision rejected unless an explicit narrowly authorized maintenance/recovery operation permits it

cases.setup: An approved remote Provider passes exact Provider, authority, capability, policy, network and credential constraints without Node fields.
Node agent is replaced while physical/logical Node identity remains the same.
Migration maps legacy status=online-ready-healthy into one global enum or lifecycle state.
assertions: split lifecycle, reachability, readiness, health and capability dimensions

cases.setup: A Facility swaps a local Provider for a compatible remote implementation.
assertions: new Provider Instance or explicit generation-advancing migration
